title: Repo Federation Manifest
description: A producer node's self-declaration, consumed by the Hub (thehub-pr). Lives at each producer repo root as federation.json. This is the discovery + callable-interface contract.

program_id.description: Stable federation node id, e.g. moneysweep-pr, aguayluz-pr, skywatcher-pr.

federation_role.description: Domain role of this node within the federation.

hub_callable_commands.description: Shell commands the Hub may invoke. setup MUST install everything the other declared commands import, and may use the network only to install SHA-pinned dependencies (e.g. the shared prii-* packages via git+https). Every command other than setup MUST be offline-safe (no network).

canonical_outputs.description: Named output paths the Hub can fetch from this producer.

federation_readiness_gate.description: Gate semantics: a non-empty blocking_conditions list means ready_for_hub_live_execution MUST be false. Conditions that have been resolved belong in resolved_conditions; advisory or domain-specific notes belong outside this gate object.
